steps.title: Identify the key contrast
steps.content: The notes establish that words representing the same sound are written and pronounced very differently across languages — that's the relevant contrast.

steps.title: Match the right answer to this signal
steps.content:
Choice B applies this signal by pairing both the similarity and the difference: both words represent snoring, yet are written and pronounced very differently.

The other three either omit the crucial difference or fail to include both specific examples for a meaningful contrast.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
